title: The Cycle of Obsolescence Driven by Backward Compatibility
description: This flowchart illustrates how the requirement for backward compatibility in IT systems drives a cycle of hardware and software obsolescence, leading to increased electronic waste and resource consumption.
elements: Increased System Resource Demand (CPU, Memory, Energy)
relationships: A new release requires a compatibility layer to support a legacy system, which increases resource demand, rendering older hardware obsolete and incapable of running the new software efficiently, ultimately leading to its disposal and the generation of electronic waste.
